title: potentilla argentea var. neglecta
intro: Potentilla argentea var. neglecta, also known as Silver Cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its silver-green foliage and white or pale pink flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and fever. The health benefits of Silver Cinquefoil include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used as a decoction, tea, or tincture, with the dried flowers, leaves, and roots being used to create these extracts.
